holds_belgian_nationality.name: holds_belgian_nationality
holds_belgian_nationality.description: The person holds Belgian nationality (directly stated as a background fact in the case).

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

falls_under_community_free_movement_law.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
falls_under_community_free_movement_law.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions.name: satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions
satisfies_access_or_residence_conditions.description: The person satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

is_in_illegal_residence.name: is_in_illegal_residence
is_in_illegal_residence.description: The person is in illegal residence on the territory.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_proc.description: The foreigner is subject to a procedure for determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining the request for international protection.

reasons_to_assume_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_assume_will_abscond
reasons_to_assume_will_abscond.description: Reasons exist to assume that the foreigner will abscond.

risk_assessed_on_objective_criteria.name: risk_assessed_on_objective_criteria
risk_assessed_on_objective_criteria.description: The risk of absconding is assessed on the basis of one or more objective criteria listed in Article 1, paragraph 2.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the foreigner has been performed.

subject_to_qualifying_procedure.name: subject_to_qualifying_procedure
subject_to_qualifying_procedure.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, an international protection procedure, or a responsible-member-state determination/transfer procedure.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner, assessed individually on objective criteria.

no_application_criterion_met.name: no_application_criterion_met
no_application_criterion_met.description: The no-application criterion is met: the foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence, or did not submit a request for international protection within the required period.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

did_not_submit_international_protection_.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_request_in_time
did_not_submit_international_protection_.description: The foreigner did not submit a request for international protection within the period provided by law.

false_information_criterion_met.name: false_information_criterion_met
false_information_criterion_met.description: The false-information criterion is met: the foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_misleading_information.name: used_false_or_misleading_information
used_false_or_misleading_information.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_falsified_documents.name: used_false_or_falsified_documents
used_false_or_falsified_documents.description: The foreigner used false or falsified documents in the context of a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud.name: committed_fraud
committed_fraud.description: The foreigner committed fraud in the context of a relevant procedure.

used_other_unlawful_means.name: used_other_unlawful_means
used_other_unlawful_means.description: The foreigner used other unlawful means in the context of a relevant procedure.

non_cooperation_criterion_met.name: non_cooperation_criterion_met
non_cooperation_criterion_met.description: The non-cooperation criterion is met: the foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the relevant authorities.

non_compliance_criterion_met.name: non_compliance_criterion_met
non_compliance_criterion_met.description: The non-compliance criterion is met: the foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with one or more specified measures.

indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_pushback_removal
indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, or removal measure.

indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry_ban
indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_entry.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, pushback, or removal.

indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_liber.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_liberty_restricting_measure_public_order
indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_liber.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.name: indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
indicated_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.description: The foreigner indicated non-compliance with or failed to comply with a measure taken by another member state equivalent to a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure.

entry_ban_criterion_met.name: entry_ban_criterion_met
entry_ban_criterion_met.description: The entry-ban criterion is met: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another member state that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom
subject_to_entry_ban_in_kingdom.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.name: subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_state
subject_to_entry_ban_in_other_member_sta.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in another member state that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

new_application_criterion_met.name: new_application_criterion_met
new_application_criterion_met.description: The new-application criterion is met: the foreigner submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence, or removal/pushback decision.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or ordering pushback or removal.

concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met.name: concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met
concealed_fingerprints_criterion_met.description: The concealed-fingerprints criterion is met: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another state bound by European regulations on determining the responsible state.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: The foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had already provided fingerprints in another state bound by European regulations on determining the responsible state for examining an international protection request.

multiple_applications_criterion_met.name: multiple_applications_criterion_met
multiple_applications_criterion_met.description: The multiple-applications criterion is met: the foreigner submitted multiple international protection requests and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The foreigner submitted multiple requests for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other member states resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_application_criterion_me.name: concealed_prior_application_criterion_met
concealed_prior_application_criterion_me.description: The concealed-prior-application criterion is met: the foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another state bound by European regulations.

concealed_prior_application_in_other_sta.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_application_in_other_sta.description: The foreigner concealed, when questioned, that they had previously submitted a request for international protection in another state bound by European regulations on determining the responsible state.

other_purposes_criterion_met.name: other_purposes_criterion_met
other_purposes_criterion_met.description: The other-purposes criterion is met: the foreigner declared or it appears from the file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a request for international protection or a residence application.

came_for_other_purposes.name: came_for_other_purposes
came_for_other_purposes.description: The foreigner declared or it appears from the file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted a request for international protection or a residence application.

manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_me.name: manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_met
manifestly_unfounded_appeal_criterion_me.description: The manifestly-unfounded-appeal criterion is met: the foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The foreigner is identified: they hold a valid travel document, passport, or identity document; or have been recognised as a national by their country's authority willing to issue a laissez-passer; or fall under nationalities for which the minister may directly issue a laissez-passer.

holds_valid_travel_document.name: holds_valid_travel_document
holds_valid_travel_document.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_country_author.name: recognised_as_national_by_country_authority
recognised_as_national_by_country_author.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_under_nationality_category_for_lai.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_laissez_passer
falls_under_nationality_category_for_lai.description: The foreigner falls under the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.name: at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met
at_least_one_absconding_criterion_met.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in Article 1, paragraph 2 is met for the foreigner.
